name: Sea Bass Greek Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust the sea bass fillets with flour.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high until hot. Sear the fillets on both sides, sealing them. Place fish in a baking pan and add lemon juice.
3. In another skillet, heat 3 tablespoons vegetable oil over medium-high. Add onions, garlic, and parsley; sauté for 3-4 minutes or until onions are translucent. Stir in pepper.
4. Transfer the onion mixture to a large saucepan with canned tomatoes, chopped tomato, bay leaves, rosemary, and white wine. Stir ingredients together and simmer on low heat for 40 minutes.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F. Pour sauce over fish and bake for 20 minutes or until just done.
6. Garnish the dish with lemon wedges.
